name: ramp-glass
description: Local-first AI workspace cloning Ramp's internal Glass suite. One package per parallel agent.

notes: One package per agent. Each agent works in its own worktree against main.
Wave 1 (4 parallel): glass-bridge, memory, workspace, sso.
Hand each agent the matching tasks/<name>.md via @file reference.
shared-types is FROZEN after F0 merges. Coordinate changes.
Only one agent may touch pnpm-lock.yaml at a time. Rebase before adding deps.
OpenCode is a bundled backend. Agents must not bypass it — all LLM/tool calls go through @opencode-ai/sdk.
